scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/api"
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm run lint --prefix apps/web" "npm run lint --prefix apps/api"
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run deploy:install && npm run deploy:build && npm run deploy:migrate && npm run deploy:restart
scripts.deploy:install: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.deploy:restart: pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js --update-env || pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
